official_docs_check: Required for current facts / AI capability / security / pricing / API / law / specs
current_highest_trust_risk: Secret誤保存とConsole情報過多によりHumanが誤操作すること
next_rule_fix: Use Guided Execution exact screen fields and Knowledge Compiler before adding new content

items.title: Official Docs Required
items.evidence_required: 最新情報、料金、機能、AI能力、セキュリティ、API、法律、仕様は、公式Docs確認なしに断定しない。
items.current_gap: Needs stronger automated checks
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: AI Routing Requires Evidence
items.evidence_required: AI選定は、AI Capability Registry、公式Docs、契約プラン、実機能力、Cost、Riskを比較してから行う。
items.current_gap: Needs stronger automated checks
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: No Evidence, No Assertion
items.evidence_required: Evidence不足の判断は、断定せずHypothesis / Pending Researchと表示する。
items.current_gap: Needs stronger automated checks
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: Explain With Existing Architecture First
items.evidence_required: 新しい概念は、既存Architectureで説明できるか確認してから追加する。
items.current_gap: Needs repeated project evidence and route audit
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: Human Cost Must Pay Back
items.evidence_required: Human Costを増やす実装は、明確なReality ChangeまたはRisk低下がない限り採用しない。
items.current_gap: Needs repeated project evidence and route audit
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: High Human Risk Requires Security
items.evidence_required: Human Riskが高い作業は、必ずSecurity / Recovery / Approvalを通す。
items.current_gap: Needs stronger automated checks
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: No Secrets In Git
items.evidence_required: Secret / API Key / PAT / service_role / Recovery CodeはGitへ保存しない。
items.current_gap: Needs stronger automated checks
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: Stop Points Become Evidence
items.evidence_required: Humanが迷った場所はReality Navigation LogへEvidenceとして残す。
items.current_gap: Needs repeated project evidence and route audit
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: Guide From Current Screen
items.evidence_required: 外部サービス設定は、Human NavigatorでCurrent Screen / Next Button / Required App / Completion Checkまで案内する。
items.current_gap: Manual guide only
items.next_action: Use Guided_Execution.md for Vercel Import

items.title: Compress Human Console
items.evidence_required: Human Consoleは長文を表示せず、Current Mission / Risk / Gauge / Next Action / Approvalに圧縮する。
items.current_gap: Lower CEO Console still includes AI-facing detail
items.next_action: Keep current screen / exact button / exact input at top

items.title: Separate Human And AI Screens
items.evidence_required: AI用画面とHuman用画面は責務を分ける。
items.current_gap: Needs repeated project evidence and route audit
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: Compress Knowledge
items.evidence_required: KnowledgeはRawのまま放置せず、Summary / Decision / Evidence / Reusable Rule / Next Reviewへ圧縮する。
items.current_gap: Compiler exists but automation does not
items.next_action: Update knowledge_registry after each major Discussion

items.title: Audit Routes And Maintenance
items.evidence_required: Route / Connection / Duplicate / Dead File / Maintenance Costは定期Auditする。
items.current_gap: Needs stronger automated checks
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: Do Not Ask Twice
items.evidence_required: 同じ情報をHumanに二度入力させない。Identity Registry / Input Memoryから再利用する。
items.current_gap: Needs repeated project evidence and route audit
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: Do Not Multi-Codex Too Early
items.evidence_required: 複数Codex化は、Task Queue / Conflict Check / Validation / Human Approval / Merge Ruleが整うまで実装しない。
items.current_gap: Needs repeated project evidence and route audit
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: Profit Requires Market Evidence
items.evidence_required: Profit Strategyは、Market Evidence / Demand / Price / Competition / Human Cost / Riskなしに実行しない。
items.current_gap: Needs repeated project evidence and route audit
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: Design Optimizes Experience
items.evidence_required: DesignやUIは見た目ではなく、Human Experience / Cognitive Load / Reality Changeで評価する。
items.current_gap: Needs repeated project evidence and route audit
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: Validate Goal Before Execution
items.evidence_required: Execution前にGoal Validationを通す。IntentをそのままExecutionへ流さない。
items.current_gap: Needs repeated project evidence and route audit
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: Discover Implementation Before Building
items.evidence_required: Implementation前にReality Connection / Implementation Discoveryを通す。
items.current_gap: Needs repeated project evidence and route audit
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution

items.title: Trust Is Earned
items.evidence_required: TrustはAIの賢さではなく、Ruleを守った回数、Evidence、成功結果で上げる。
items.current_gap: Needs repeated project evidence and route audit
items.next_action: Use in Rule Audit before execution
